texto: Watching a peaceful death of a human being reminds us of a falling star
autor: one of a million lights in a vast sky that flares up for a brief moment only to disappear into the endless night forever.
explicacao: Citação de one of a million lights in a vast sky that flares up for a brief moment only to disappear into the endless night forever. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Watching a peaceful death of a human being reminds us of a falling star” articula reflexao, elisabeth-kubler-ross, watching em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
